[GlobalRateLimiter] [need scope] [prevent ambiguity]. [Tell me scope: limit per IP, limit per user ID, or total global limit for entire API?]
answer: Limit per IP globally across all routes. Use fixed window tracking 100 requests per 15 minutes. Fail open if Redis down.

[429 Response] [need format] [prevent ambiguity]. [Tell me response format: plain text, specific JSON structure, or include Retry-After header?]
answer: Blocked response use JSON format `{ error: 'Too Many Requests' }` with HTTP 429. No Retry-After header needed to keep logic simple.
